channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rivian’s stock jumps 20% as investors cheer 2026 growth potential
item.description: Rivian expects to deliver up to 67,000 EVs this year but could dole out more than $2.1 billion on capital expenditures as it expands its roadmap.

item.title: The weirdest way to invest in Claude maker Anthropic is rallying again after funding round
item.description: A $30 billion funding round by Anthropic, maker of the popular Claude large language model, led to gains for a far-flung investor in premarket trade o...

item.title: Steel stocks are falling as they get a taste of the ‘TACO trade’
item.description: Steel and aluminum stocks were falling after an FT report that President Donald Trump is softening his stance on tariffs — a subject of consumer compl...

item.title: AMD is falling behind, warns this analyst who says other chip stocks are better bets
item.description: AMD’s reliance on third-party networking and a lagging software stack may pose problems for the semiconductor company, according to D.A. Davidson.

item.title: Why Bank of America says 30-year Treasurys are the best hedge for investors
item.description: Futher strenghtening in the Japanese yen would be detrimental to risk-on assets as traders unwind the carry-trade

item.title: AI disruption fears hit yet another new industry: Media
item.description: The artificial intelligence threat trade hit media stocks late this week, sparking a selloff of names like Netflix, Fox and Walt Disney.

item.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 posted a third consecutive losing session as concerns over disruption from artificial intelligence weighed down the major averages Thursda...

item.title: Deutsche Bank upgrades Airbnb on earnings beat and AI momentum
item.description: Deutsche Bank's $154 price target implies a 33% upside for shares of Airbnb.

item.title: Jefferies turns bullish on AI fraud software name as demand accelerates
item.description: Jefferies sees shares of Mitek System rising 30% from here.

item.title: Microsoft is down this year on fears AI will disrupt Office. Goldman says buy the dip
item.description: Goldman Sachs' $600 price target implies that shares of Microsoft could rally 49%.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
